title: morus alba subvar. tatarica
intro: Morus alba subvar. tatarica, also known as the white mulberry or tatarian mulberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Eastern Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Morus alba subvar. tatarica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-aging effects. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used to make extracts and powders for further medicinal applications.
